description_long: This is a female adult dressed in a professional uniform, likely representing a service worker such as a waitress or hospitality staff. She wears a collared short-sleeve shirt tucked into a knee-length apron and skirt, with a name tag visible on her chest. Her hair is styled neatly in a bun, secured with a hair tie, and she wears simple, closed-toe heels. The figure stands upright with arms extended horizontally, displaying a neutral and approachable demeanor. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the apron is tied at the back, suggesting readiness for work. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is clean and well-groomed.
description: A female adult in a professional service uniform with a collared shirt, apron, skirt, and heels, hair styled in a bun. She stands upright with arms outstretched, ready for work.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared shirt, apron, skirt, name tag, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, bun hairstyle, and the apron tied at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, apron ties, skirt, and the bun hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and the neat bun, similar to the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve collared shirt, knee-length skirt, waist apron, name tag
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
